text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
Yaeno, thanks for before. I couldn't have<n>figured
out that classical lit problem<n>without you.

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text: Truly? It was my honor to be of service.

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
Actually, we've got a quiz tomorrow, so I<n>was
wondering... Would you help me<n>study again?

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
That is no trouble at all. I will aid you to<n>the best
of my abilities.

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
Thanks... You know, you've been helping<n>me a
lot. I'd like to show my thanks<n>somehow.

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text: To me? Please, that won't be necessary...

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text: No, wait—there is one thing I'd like toask of you. Would you be willing to do apartner running session with me?

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
Partner running? Sure, but is that really<n>all you
want?

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
Oh, absolutely! An opportunity to run<n>with you is
a precious thing—just the<n>thought of it rouses my
spirit!

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
It would be a great honor to learn<n>directly from
one of the Eternal Top<n>Three! After all,  I shall
compete against<n>you one day!

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
Hehe, I'm excited to run with you too<n>now. All
right, let's go get changed.

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
Wait... shouldn't we take care of your<n>studies for
the quiz first?
